mainEntity.name: How Much Will My Bay Area Bathroom Remodel Actually Cost?
mainEntity.text: How Much Will My Bay Area Bathroom Remodel Actually Cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Let's talk about the elephant in the room: the cost of a bathroom remodel in the Bay Area. It's not a small number, and it's smart to know what you're getting into. A purely cosmetic refresh with new paint and maybe lighting can run from $15k–$25k. A more common full renovation, where you're replacing the tub, tile, and vanity, usually lands in the $25k–$45k range. For a high-end primary bath with luxury finishes, it's not unusual to see costs exceed $50k. Remember that in our area, labor often makes up 40–65% of that total budget. One of the most important things you can do is set aside a contingency fund—about 10-20% of your total budget. This covers unexpected issues, like hidden rot or old plumbing, that we can only find after demolition starts. Getting a detailed estimate is the first step to understanding your specific costs. If you're ready to see what's possible for your space and budget, give us a call at 650-532-5858.
